series_metadata.series_description: Information pertaining to the audit of compliance with the continuing education requirements. This may include correspondence, certified mail receipts, CE tracking forms, certificates of completion, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: If licensee is not compliant with CE requirement, send enforcement file; if licensee is compliant, audit cycle is complete ; Electronic: This media applies if licensee scans and emails audit information and staff does not print attachments. If licensee is not compliant with CE requirement, send enforcement file; if licensee is compliant, audit cycle is complete
